meta.title: Employment costs & net pay (Skuad live calculator)
meta.note: European countries fetched live from the Skuad API at several gross-salary points (genuine per-country calculation; may differ from the eBook study). Slovenia is unavailable in the API. US cities reuse the blog figures because the API's US state income tax is unreliable. Cost of living reuses the eBook. Figures are estimates for comparison only.
